zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，等待突破]
zh.content:
目前比特币/美元（BTC/USD）价格在66936.23美元附近，短期内呈现震荡整理的走势。24小时变化幅度较小，仅为0.02%，显示出市场的观望情绪。当前价格紧贴于SMA(20)均线（66815.11美元），这一位置可能提供短期支撑，但突破与否仍需观察。

技术指标方面，MACD显示负值（-30.089176），表明市场动能较弱，但未出现明显的卖压信号，市场尚未形成明确的方向性。由于RSI数据未给出，不能完全确认超买或超卖的状态，这意味着市场情绪尚未过度极端。交易者应关注即将到来的波动。

支撑位方面，66852.11美元为最近的低点，若价格跌破该位，可能会进一步测试更深的支撑区域。上方的阻力位在67022美元附近，一旦突破该区域，可能会推动价格向更高水平迈进，开启进一步的上涨趋势。

考虑到当前市场的震荡整理特征，建议交易者暂时观望，等待价格突破关键的支撑或阻力位后再做决策。若价格突破67022美元，考虑做多；若跌破66852.11美元，则可考虑做空。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently trading near $66,936, showing a remarkably flat 24-hour performance with minimal movement. Price action has remained tightly confined between the daily high of $67,022 and low of $66,852, suggesting a phase of consolidation. This indicates indecision among traders, as neither bulls nor bears are asserting dominance. The proximity of the current price to the 20-day simple moving average at $66,815 reinforces this neutral sentiment, implying that the market is testing the equilibrium zone and waiting for a directional trigger.  

Momentum indicators reflect mixed signals. The MACD stands at -30.089, signaling mild bearish pressure, though without the signal line, confirmation remains incomplete. The absence of a reported RSI makes overbought or oversold conditions harder to gauge, but the narrow price range suggests that momentum is subdued. Traders should note that the market’s lack of volatility could precede a breakout, either to the upside if bulls regain control or downside if support fails. Close attention to intraday patterns will be critical for timely entries.  

Support appears near $66,815, coinciding with the 20-day SMA, while immediate resistance aligns with the recent high at $67,022. A decisive breach above this resistance could open the path to $67,500 or higher, while a drop below support may test $66,500. These levels will serve as important reference points for risk management, guiding stop-loss placements and position sizing. Observing volume spikes in these regions could provide early confirmation of breakout or breakdown scenarios.  

For trading strategy, cautious range trading might be appropriate under current conditions. Short-term traders could consider buying near support with tight stops, while targeting the upper bound of the consolidation range. Conversely, breakout traders should await a clear move beyond resistance or support before committing, as entering prematurely may expose positions to false signals. Maintaining disciplined risk management will be key, given the market’s current indecisive momentum and compressed price action.  

Word count: 270
